mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash, display_name, role, email, created_at FROM sys_user ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, username, password_hash, display_name, role, email, created_at FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password_hash, display_name, role, email) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{displayName}, #{role}, #{email})
